episodes.title: Urban Exploration of the NXIVM Cult Property
episodes.description:
Living in the Albany-Troy-Schenectady New York area the national news story of the NXIVM Cult was of great interest. Located at 455 New Karner Rd, Albany, NY, it was housed in a fairly ordinary office building similar to the rest in the complex right next to the YMCA, and the Greater Capital Association of Realtors Inc. No one would have suspected what was happening inside. 

NXIVM had a number of shell companies to hide wealth and control, one of which was the House of Equis Lic. Its owners were Sara & Clare Bronform, the daughters of Edgar Bronform Sr. the Chairman of Seagram Liquor company. Clare, the youngest daughter, lived at the House of Equis property on West Wind Rd. in Delanson. When she was sentenced to over 6 years in prison and fined $6 million, the property was put up for sale initially for $4.5 million. Interestingly not all the over 300 acre property was for sale, there was one 5 acre plot with a dilapidated and abandoned house on it. The rest of the estate is well cared for and has recently been painted with updated landscaping. We’re looking at that separate property today.  [1]

The original section of the house was two-story and built in 1840, with apparent additions creating a two-bedroom, one-bathroom house. The 1840 section has a basement with an inside stairway and an outside entrance. The addition has what appears to be a crawl space and upstairs. The floor looked sketchy, so I didn’t enter but there was a large section of the wall missing so you could view the inside. There is an outbuilding that was investigated and the basement as much as possible. It was an interesting look at what was left of a building almost two hundred years old. In 2007 the Zestimate® was $127,800 and it could have been rented for Zestimate® of $1,457/month. [2]

I hope you liked the video. The NXIVM cult was big news in the area, and I was surprised when I found out about the property. What was even more of a surprise at the time was how the building investigated was kept separate from the other property and the little outbuilding seemed even better kept. Those who watched the raw film thought I should have looked in the file cabinets. Frankly I was worried about what I might find. Thanks for watching and please hit the Like button [thumb-up]. It tells YouTube to promote the channel to more people. To know when the next video comes out in any of my playlists, just subscribe and ring the bell. Thanks so much for watching and leave a comment. I really appreciate your support. Have a nice day!

For additional information on NXIVM and the leaders of the cult refer to:
[1] Frank Parlato. The Cult of NXIVM Series:
Keith Raniere, Self-Proclaimed Smartest Man In the World and Spiritually Evolved Guru, Niagara Falls Reporter, https://www.niagarafallsreporter.com/Stories/2015/DEC03/NXIVM.html, 2022.
[2] Smith & Mahoney. Real Property Tax Service Agency, Albany, NY, 2010. 

Dr. RGST INFORMATION: https://errrugenstein.my.canva.site/
